stealthrock.shortDescription: Hurts foes on switch-in. Factors Rock weakness.
stealthrock.description: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Fails if the effect is already active on the opposing side. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

steameruption.shortDescription: 30% chance to burn the target. Thaws target.
steameruption.description: Has a 30% chance to burn the target. The target thaws out if it is frozen.

steamroller.shortDescription: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
steamroller.description: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

steelbeam.description: Whether or not this move is successful and even if it would cause fainting, the user loses 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, unless the user has the Magic Guard Ability.

steelroller.shortDescription: Fails if there is no terrain active. Ends the terrain.
steelroller.description: Fails if there is no terrain active. Ends the effects of Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, Misty Terrain, and Psychic Terrain.

steelwing.shortDescription: 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
steelwing.description: Has a 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.

stickyweb.shortDescription: Lowers Speed of grounded foes by 1 on switch-in.
stickyweb.description: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, lowering the Speed by 1 stage of each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Fails if the effect is already active on the opposing side. Can be removed from the opposing side if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

stockpile.shortDescription: Raises user's Defense, Sp. Def by 1. Max 3 uses.
stockpile.description: Raises the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage. The user's Stockpile count increases by 1. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 3. The user's Stockpile count is reset to 0 when it is no longer active.

stomp.shortDescription: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
stomp.description: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

stompingtantrum.shortDescription: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.
stompingtantrum.description: Power doubles if the user's last move on the previous turn, including moves called by other moves or those used through Instruct, Magic Coat, Snatch, or the Dancer or Magic Bounce Abilities, failed to do any of its normal effects, not including damage from an unsuccessful High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, or Mind Blown, or if the user was prevented from moving by any effect other than recharging or Sky Drop. A move that was blocked by Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, Spiky Shield, Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard will not double this move's power, nor will Bounce or Fly ending early due to the effect of Gravity, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.

stoneaxe.shortDescription: Sets Stealth Rock on the target's side.
stoneaxe.description: If this move is successful, it sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

stoneedge.description: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.

storedpower.shortDescription: + 20 power for each of the user's stat boosts.
storedpower.description: Power is equal to 20+(X*20), where X is the user's total stat stage changes that are greater than 0.

stormthrow.shortDescription: Always results in a critical hit.
stormthrow.description: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities.

strangesteam.description: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.

strengthsap.shortDescription: User heals HP=target's Atk stat. Lowers Atk by 1.
strengthsap.description: Lowers the target's Attack by 1 stage. The user restores its HP equal to the target's Attack stat calculated with its stat stage before this move was used. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. Fails if the target's Attack stat stage is -6.

stringshot.description: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

strugglebug.shortDescription: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Sp. Atk by 1.
strugglebug.description: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.

stuffcheeks.shortDescription: Must hold Berry to use. User eats Berry, Def +2.
stuffcheeks.description: This move cannot be selected unless the user is holding a Berry. The user eats its Berry and raises its Defense by 2 stages. This effect is not prevented by the Klutz or Unnerve Abilities, or the effects of Embargo or Magic Room. Fails if the user is not holding a Berry.
